info.name: Stripe Payout Flow (Sufficient Balance)
info.description: End-to-end payout after a completed ride: ride earns driver wallet balance → POST /wallet/payout triggers Stripe transfer (platform → Fleet VA) + payout (Fleet VA → driver bank). Fleet VA has sufficient EUR balance — no top-up required. Asserts payout_order created with non-FAILED status and merchant_top_up_amount IS NULL.

exec: // Auto-skip mock-server requests when envType is not Local.

body.raw: {"db_name": "atlas_dev", "sql": "INSERT INTO atlas_driver_offer_bpp.subscription_config (service_name, merchant_id, merchant_operating_city_id, payment_service_name, payout_service_name, allow_driver_fee_calc_schedule, allow_due_addition, allow_manual_payment_links, deep_link_expiry_time_in_minutes, generic_batch_size_for_jobs, generic_job_reschedule_time, is_triggered_at_end_ride, max_retry_count, payment_link_channel, payment_link_job_time, send_deep_link, send_in_app_fcm_notifications, use_overlay_service, default_city_vehicle_category, subscription_enabled_for_vehicle_categories, number_of_free_trial_rides, free_trial_rides_applicable, execution_enabled_for_vehicle_categories, is_subscription_enabled_at_category_level, enable_city_based_fee_switch, is_vendor_split_enabled, subscription_down, is_ui_enabled, is_free_trial_days_applicable, enable_service_usage_charge_default, autopay_enabled, show_manual_plans_in_ui, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('PREPAID_SUBSCRIPTION', 'a7f3c8e2-4b5d-4c9a-8f6e-2d1a3b4c5d6e', 'beabba6a-c817-43d2-93b2-a916f5cf2ceb', 'Payment_Stripe', 'RidePayout_Stripe', false, false, false, 15, 30, 60, false, 4, 'WHATSAPP', 21600, false, false, false, 'AUTO_CATEGORY', '{}', 20, false, '{}', false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, now(), now()) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING"}

item.name: Mock Stripe: Enable Charges + Payouts on Connected Account

exec: var d = pm.response.json(); console.log('Bank account status:', JSON.stringify(d)); pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); pm.test('Charges enabled', function () { pm.expect(d.chargesEnabled).to.be.true; }); pm.test('Payouts enabled', function () { pm.expect(d.payoutsEnabled).to.be.true; });
var d = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('rider_authId', d.authId); pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
var d = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('rider_token', d.token); pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

var d = pm.response.json(); if (d && d.length > 0) { pm.environment.set('payment_method_id', d[0].paymentMethodId || d[0].id); } else { pm.environment.set('payment_method_id', 'pm_card_visa'); } pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

var d = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('searchId', d.searchId); console.log('Search ID:', d.searchId); pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); const _delay = 5000; const _start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _start < _delay) {}

pm.test('Has estimates', function () { pm.expect(d, 'response body').to.be.an('object'); pm.expect(d.estimates, 'estimates field').to.be.an('array'); pm.expect(d.estimates.length, 'estimate count').to.be.above(0); });
pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); const _sel_delay = 8000; const _sel_start = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _sel_start < _sel_delay) {}

var d = pm.response.json(); if (d.searchRequestsForDriver && d.searchRequestsForDriver.length > 0) { var req = d.searchRequestsForDriver[0]; pm.environment.set('searchTryId', req.searchTryId); console.log('Got request, searchTryId:', req.searchTryId); pm.test('Status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200)); pm.test('Has search requests', () => pm.expect(d.searchRequestsForDriver).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty); pm.collectionVariables.set('_nearby_attempt', '0'); } else { var attempt = parseInt(pm.collectionVariables.get('_nearby_attempt') || '0'); if (attempt < 8) { console.log('Pool empty (attempt', attempt + 1, ') — retrying...'); var t0 = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - t0 < 5000) {} pm.collectionVariables.set('_nearby_attempt', String(attempt + 1)); pm.execution.setNextRequest(pm.info.requestName); } else { pm.test('Status 200', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200)); pm.test('Has search requests', () => pm.expect(d.searchRequestsForDriver).to.be.an('array').that.is.not.empty); pm.collectionVariables.set('_nearby_attempt', '0'); } }
pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); console.log('Driver accepted ride!');

var d = pm.response.json(); if (d.list && d.list.length > 0) { var b = d.list[0]; pm.environment.set('customer_bookingId', b.id); pm.environment.set('ride_otp', b.rideList[0].rideOtp); console.log('Booking:', b.id, 'OTP:', b.rideList[0].rideOtp); } pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

var d = pm.response.json(); if (d.list && d.list.length > 0) { pm.environment.set('driver_ride_id', d.list[0].id); console.log('Ride:', d.list[0].id); } pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
// Wait for ledger entries to post after ride end

var d = pm.response.json(); console.log('Driver wallet balance:', JSON.stringify(d)); pm.test('Status 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); }); pm.test('Wallet has positive balance after ride', function () { pm.expect(d.currentBalance).to.be.above(0); });
